svg.title: Private Anyscale-ready AKS on Azure
svg.desc: Simplified Azure architecture diagram using official draw.io Azure2 icon artwork. It shows Bastion-first operator access, a private AKS API, in-cluster bootstrap, VNet-resident private endpoints for ADLS Gen2 and ACR, Azure-native Anyscale platform deployment outside the workload VNet, Azure Firewall egress, DNS Private Resolver, and Log Analytics plus AMPLS observability.
svg.text: Bastion-first operator access, private AKS API, in-cluster bootstrap, and private endpoint access to ADLS Gen2 and ACR.
Azure-native Anyscale platform deployment, Firewall-managed egress, and observability remain outside the workload VNet.
Global platform and control services (outside VNet)
Anyscale platform deployment, identity, egress policy, and observability
Private endpoint only | Shared key disabled
Bootstrap: ingress-nginx + NVIDIA plugin | private frontend IP
DNS path: AKS nodes use Azure Firewall DNS proxy as the VNet DNS server, and DNS Private Resolver handles hybrid forwarding and Private Link zones.
